Package github.clone_code_detection.antlr4

Interface JavaParserListener

All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExtendListener, JavaParserBaseListener
public interface JavaParserListener extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by JavaParser.
